class BaseCommand:
    """Base command class for the application.
    
    This class serves as the foundation for all command implementations.
    It provides common functionality and interface that specific commands
    can inherit and extend.
    
    Attributes:
        name (str): The name of the command
        description (str): Brief description of what the command does
        options (dict): Configuration options for the command
